item.title: Seattle Center Sculpture Walk 2026
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Seattle Center

Experience temporary art installations on our grounds throughout the year.

From Seattle Center Events

Event details

item.title: Tech 101: Data Privacy
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Queen Anne Branch, Meeting Room

What is a digital footprint? How is it created? What can we do about it?

From SPL - Queen Anne Branch

Event details

item.title: Seattle Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Armory

Seattle Center Festál presents Seattle Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival in partnership with Seattle Cherry Blossom & Japanese Cultural Festival Committee (SCBJCF). The festival deepens the understanding and serves as a vehicle for sharing Japanese and Japanese American culture and heritage through hundreds of performing and martial arts, exhibits and demonstrations, hands on kids’ activities, culinary treats, and more!

From Seattle Center Events

Event details

item.title: Robin Hood
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Seattle Children's Theatre

A wannabe king, lawless law enforcement, and the rich hoarding all the wealth—it’s dark times in Nottingham. But out of the mists of nearby Sherwood Forest comes the hero we’ve been waiting for.

From Seattle Center Events

Event details

item.title: Appropriate: Preview Performance
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Seattle Repertory Theatre

When the Lafayettes descend upon their late father’s crumbling plantation home for an estate sale, they unearth an appalling secret that pits them against one another.

From Seattle Center Events

Event details

item.title: Giselle
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall

A mountain village in a lush forest becomes the backdrop to love, betrayal, and otherworldly specters in this compelling masterpiece.

From Seattle Center Events

Event details

item.title: Mary Jane
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Seattle Repertory Theatre

Poignantly humorous and deeply cathartic, this semi-autobiographical drama by Tony-nominated playwright Amy Herzog is a love letter to caregivers and support systems of all kinds.

From Seattle Center Events

Event details

item.title: All Access Pass – Climate Pledge Arena Tours
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

Kraken Game Day Tours Beat the crowds and take a guided VIP tour before watching the Kraken take the ice. -Be the first fans in the arena -Guarantee your game night giveaway (if applicable) -Beat the crowds and shop the team store before doors open *Please note the tour lasts about 45-60 minutes

From Climate Pledge Arena

Event details

item.title: Gabor Maté
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: McCaw Hall, 321 Mercer Street, Seattle, WA

Embark on a profound journey into the intricate landscapes of the human mind and soul with renowned physician, speaker, and bestselling author, Dr. Gabor Maté. With compassion and unwavering authenticity, Dr. Maté explores the interconnectedness of mind, body, and spirit, shedding light on the underlying causes of human suffering and resilience. Drawing from his groundbreaking research on addiction, trauma, and the impact of early childhood experiences, he offers a transformative perspective on healing and personal growth. Through compelling anecdotes, scientific research, and practical wisdom, Dr. Maté invites audiences to reconsider their understanding of mental health, addiction, and the nature of human connection. Whether you're a healthcare professional, a mental health advocate, or simply a curious seeker of truth, this event promises to inspire, educate, and ignite a deeper understanding of the human condition.

From McCaw Hall

Event details

item.title: An Evening with Gabor Mate: The Myth of Normal
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall

Embark on a profound journey into the intricate landscapes of the human mind and soul with renowned physician, speaker, and bestselling author, Dr. Gabor Maté.

From Seattle Center Events

item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 2 PM

Gypsy tells the story of ambitious showbiz mother Rose, who treks across the country with her daughters Baby June and Louise in search of success with their homespun vaudeville act.

From Seattle Center Events

item.title: International Children's Friendship Festival

Event details

item.title: Robin Hood
item.description:
Sunday, April 19, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Seattle Children's Theatre

A wannabe king, lawless law enforcement, and the rich hoarding all the wealth—it’s dark times in Nottingham. But out of the mists of nearby Sherwood Forest comes the hero we’ve been waiting for.

From Seattle Center Events

Event details

item.title: Giselle
item.description:
Sunday, April 19, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall

A mountain village in a lush forest becomes the backdrop to love, betrayal, and otherworldly specters in this compelling masterpiece.

From Seattle Center Events

item.title: Mary Jane
item.description:
Sunday, April 19, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Seattle Repertory Theatre

Poignantly humorous and deeply cathartic, this semi-autobiographical drama by Tony-nominated playwright Amy Herzog is a love letter to caregivers and support systems of all kinds.

From Seattle Center Events

item.title: Stifel Stars on Ice

Saturday, May 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

Please visit our website to view the Arena Guide with Bag Policy and Prohibited Items list.

From Climate Pledge Arena

Event details

item.title: Stifel Stars on Ice Pre-Show Stargazer Pass
item.description:
Saturday, May 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

THIS IS AN OPTIONAL UPGRADE. TICKET TO THE MAIN EVENT IS ALSO REQUIRED. Pre-Show Stargazer Event takes place prior to Stars on Ice show. Enjoy early entry, watch the skater warm-ups, and participate in a Q&A with several skaters from specified seating sections. Due to this event taking place prior to doors opening, EVERYONE entering the venue early must have an event ticket AND Pre-Show Stargazer Pass for entry. This includes all children as well as the parent(s)/guardian(s) wishing to accompany them into the building. If you plan on attending the Pre-Show Stargazer Event, please make sure you have BOTH tickets. NO EXCEPTIONS. Late arrivals will not be refunded. OPTIONAL UPSELL. NOT VALID FOR EVENT ADMISSION. MUST ALSO HAVE EVENT TICKET! FAN MUST BRING UPSELL TICKET TO EVENT DAY FOR ENTRY. NOTE SPECIFIC PRE-SHOW ACCESS START TIME! STARGAZER PASS TICKET REQUIRED FOR ENTRY.

From Climate Pledge Arena

Event details

item.title: Alex Warren: Finding Family on the Road
item.description:
Saturday, June 13, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena, 334 1st Ave N, Seattle, WA

Alex Warren is contributing $1 from every ticket sold to Camp Kesem, providing free camps and programs for kids with parents fighting cancer - through his partnership with PLUS1. Please visit our website to view the Arena Guide with Bag Policy and Prohibited Items list. Alex Warren is contributing $1 from every ticket sold to Camp Kesem, providing free camps and programs for kids with parents fighting cancer?through his partnership with PLUS1. All Ages Welcome!
